title: Bio³ Map
editingHint: You're correcting the current assessment: saving won't create a new one. Use "New assessment" for a reassessment over time.
disclaimer: Functional wellbeing map — not a disease diagnosis or a promise of cure. It points to areas worth professional follow-up.
indexCaption: Overall index · all axes · dysfunction grade (lower = better)
pyramidShareCaption: each axis's weight in the total · sums to 100% · color = severity
partialHint: Partial reading — add the pending data (e.g. labs) for the full map.
empty: No assessment yet. Create one to generate the Bio³ Map.
formHint: Fill in what you assessed (0–10). Anything left blank counts as pending data.
legendRanges: 0–30 in balance · 31–69 chronic dysfunction · 70–100 high dysfunction (possible acute flares)
importHint: Pulls the latest answers (MSQ, PHQ-9, GAD-7, HPA), normalizes to 0–10 and pre-fills the items for you to review.
unansweredHint: Questionnaire(s) not answered: {list}. These items stay pending until the patient answers (or fill them in manually). It's missing data, not a system error.
phq9Alert: Clinical alert: PHQ-9 item 9 (ideation) flagged ({value}/3). Assess risk per your protocol — do not ignore.
autoDraftBanner: Partial map generated from answers — complete the physical exam (Biomechanical) to finalize.
sendToPatientError: Could not send. Please try again.
sendNoEmail: Patient has no email on file. Add an email to the profile to send the report.
